---
title: "Week 17: Finals Week"
subtitle: "Final Web Portfolio Due"
date: "2026-12-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    colorlinks: true
---

## Final Portfolio (250 pts)

**Due:** Friday, December 19, 11:59 PM | **Submit to:** Blackboard

This is it. Your final portfolio is a complete, published research document that demonstrates everything you have learned this semester.

---

## Submission Checklist

Before you submit, confirm every item:

- [ ] All six sections are complete (Introduction, Literature Review, Method, Results, Discussion, References)
- [ ] All instruction comments (`<!-- ... -->`) are deleted
- [ ] `coding_data_clean.RDS` is in the project folder
- [ ] `references.bib` is updated with all cited sources
- [ ] `apa.csl` is downloaded and in the project root
- [ ] `_quarto.yml` is updated with your name, title, and correct chapter order
- [ ] The project renders without errors in RStudio
- [ ] PDF is renamed to `Lastname_FinalPortfolio.pdf`
- [ ] GitHub Pages is live and accessible
- [ ] Live URL loads correctly in an incognito/private browser window

---

## What to Submit on Blackboard

Two items:

1. **Upload:** `Lastname_FinalPortfolio.pdf`
2. **Text box:** Paste your GitHub Pages URL (e.g., `https://username.github.io/mc451-final-project/`)

Both items are required. Missing either one will result in an incomplete submission.

---

## Getting Help

- **Course website:** [Open Methods Hub](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/liaison-program/) --- check here first
- **Email:** aleith@siue.edu (allow 24 hours Mon--Fri)
- **Discord:** APLeith
